# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    S = data[1]

    unique_substrings = set()
    i = 0
    while i < N:
        j = i
        while j < N and S[j] == S[i]:
            j += 1
        # Add all substrings of the current run
        for length in range(1, j - i + 1):
            unique_substrings.add(S[i] * length)
        i = j

    print(len(unique_substrings))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
